response.global_analysis: 1. Reference JSON Lyrics: Null for both songs, so manual transcription and translation were utilized. 2. Song Identifications: Song 1 is 'Honto no Watashi' and Song 2 is 'Anastasis Girl' feat. Laplus Darkness. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed accurately to match rapid rap sections and transition segments perfectly. Truncated overlaps to avoid cascading delays during duet parts.

subtitles.original: 勝手なイメージ 決めつけないで 全て私
subtitles.english: Don't push your assumptions on me, it's all me.

subtitles.original: それでも時には 温もりが恋しい
subtitles.english: Even so, sometimes, I long for warmth.

subtitles.original: そんな感情に 流されて しまいそうな夜もある
subtitles.english: There are nights when I feel like getting swept away by such emotions.

subtitles.original: こんな甘い甘い言葉だけ求めてしまうような弱い私じゃない
subtitles.english: I'm not so weak that I'd just seek sweet, sweet words.

subtitles.original: 1回2回 経験だって 私を強くしてくれたから
subtitles.english: Because even experiencing it once or twice has made me stronger.

subtitles.original: これがこれが私の本当
subtitles.english: This, this is the real me.

subtitles.original: とても狭い狭い世界の中だけで終わらせるつもりはないんだ
subtitles.english: I have no intention of letting it end within such a very narrow world.

subtitles.original: 広い広い世界の果てまで 駆け抜けていってゆくんだから
subtitles.english: Because I'm going to run all the way to the end of this wide, wide world!

subtitles.original: どんなに苦しくて傷ついても楽しんでやるさ
subtitles.english: No matter how painful or hurtful it is, I'll make sure to enjoy it!

subtitles.original: いけてるのも見せてめちゃくちゃじゃなくて生き方なんだから
subtitles.english: Showing my cool side, not just being a mess, because it's my way of life!

subtitles.original: アナスタシスガール feat. ラプラス・ダークネス
subtitles.english: [Anastasis Girl feat. Laplus Darkness]

subtitles.original: あれもこれもそれもタブー
subtitles.english: This, that, and everything else is taboo.

subtitles.original: 分かってるの？待ってよ
subtitles.english: Do you understand? Wait up.

subtitles.original: ノイズ スパイス ぐちぐち 邪魔する
subtitles.english: Noise and spice, grumbling and getting in the way.

subtitles.original: 分かってるの 届いてるでしょ
subtitles.english: I understand, you hear me, right?

subtitles.original: 誰がベスト？ 聞き飽きたペースト
subtitles.english: Who's the best? I'm tired of copy-pasted opinions.

subtitles.original: 手を貸す準備はできた？
subtitles.english: Are you ready to lend a hand?

subtitles.original: 前ならえは蹴り上げるぜ ビクター
subtitles.english: I'll kick down the status quo, victor!

subtitles.original: 脳面上だけを終え 挑発してもね
subtitles.english: Even if you finish just on the surface and try to provoke us...

subtitles.original: 痛いの 痛いの 飛んでいけないくらい
subtitles.english: It hurts, it hurts, so much I can't fly away.

subtitles.original: 勝算 悪化の細胞で 脳内戦 爪出しましょう
subtitles.english: With deteriorating cells of potential success, let's fight inside our minds and show our claws.

subtitles.original: あたし アナスタシスガール 不滅の強さが手に入る
subtitles.english: I'm the Anastasis Girl, gaining immortal strength.

subtitles.original: だから nanana... いち、にの、さんで だんだんだん
subtitles.english: So, nanana... on the count of three, bam, bam, bam!

subtitles.original: アナスタシスガール 昨日いじめたバツ
subtitles.english: Anastasis Girl, the punishment for bullying me yesterday.

subtitles.original: 君は nanana... 地獄へ だんだんだん
subtitles.english: You, nanana... straight to hell, down, down, down.

subtitles.original: 革命御来 革命御来 革命御来 アナスタシスガール
subtitles.english: Behold the revolution, behold the revolution, behold the revolution! Anastasis Girl!

subtitles.original: お口チャック
subtitles.english: Zip your mouth.

subtitles.original: 耳も離さないつもり
subtitles.english: I don't intend to let your ears go.

subtitles.original: お口チャック あたしだけに囁け
subtitles.english: Zip your mouth, whisper only to me.

subtitles.original: 健やかなるときも 病めるときも
subtitles.english: In sickness and in health.

subtitles.original: ずっと人間らしくあれ
subtitles.english: Always remain human.

subtitles.original: 微妙な調節が不可欠
subtitles.english: Subtle adjustments are essential.

subtitles.original: 対応 対応 対応 対応
subtitles.english: Response, response, response, response.

subtitles.original: 痛いの 痛いの 飛んでいけないなら
subtitles.english: It hurts, it hurts, if I can't fly away...

subtitles.original: やっちゃいな挑戦者 精神論で 目には目をお返しいたしましょう
subtitles.english: Go for it, challenger! With willpower, let's return an eye for an eye.

subtitles.original: あたし アナスタシスガール ブレイクアウトの時間
subtitles.english: I'm the Anastasis Girl, it's time for a breakout.

subtitles.original: だから nanana... いち、にの、さんで だんだんだん
subtitles.english: So, nanana... on the count of three, bam, bam, bam!

subtitles.original: アナスタシスガール 極めて遺憾です
subtitles.english: Anastasis Girl, it's extremely regrettable.

subtitles.original: 君は nanana... 地獄へ だんだんだん
subtitles.english: You, nanana... straight to hell, down, down, down.

subtitles.original: 革命御来 革命御来 革命御来 アナスタシスガール
subtitles.english: Behold the revolution, behold the revolution, behold the revolution! Anastasis Girl!

subtitles.original: あぁ あぁ お願い放っといて
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, please leave me alone.

subtitles.original: あぁ あぁ お願い放っといて
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, please leave me alone.

subtitles.original: お度量君の買って その度犠牲にしてる
subtitles.english: Catering to your whims, sacrificing myself every time.

subtitles.original: 汚れるだけの肌 むき出し稼働中
subtitles.english: Skin that only gets dirty is exposed and in operation.

subtitles.original: あたし アナスタシスガール 不滅の強さが手に入る
subtitles.english: I'm the Anastasis Girl, gaining immortal strength.

subtitles.original: だから nanana... いち、にの、さんで だんだんだん
subtitles.english: So, nanana... on the count of three, bam, bam, bam!

subtitles.english: Anastasis Girl, the punishment for bullying me yesterday.

subtitles.english: You, nanana... straight to hell, down, down, down.
